questions.hindi: प्रिय सर, आपके ईमेल के लिए धन्यवाद।
questions.english: Dear Sir, thank you for your email.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject line intent + greeting + concise body + sign-off
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Dear Sir, thank you for your email."

questions.hindi: मैं इस मीटिंग में शामिल नहीं हो पाऊँगा।
questions.english: I will not be able to attend this meeting.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject line intent + greeting + concise body + sign-off
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I will not be able to attend this meeting."

questions.hindi: कृपया मुझे रिपोर्ट भेजें।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject line intent + greeting + concise body + sign-off
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Please send me the report."

questions.hindi: मैं जल्द ही जवाब दूँगा।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject line intent + greeting + concise body + sign-off
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I will reply soon."

questions.hindi: यह ईमेल महत्वपूर्ण जानकारी के लिए है।
questions.english: This email is for important information.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject line intent + greeting + concise body + sign-off
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "This email is for important information."

questions.hindi: कृपया अटैचमेंट देखें।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject line intent + greeting + concise body + sign-off
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Please check the attachment."

questions.hindi: मुझे आपकी सहायता चाहिए।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject line intent + greeting + concise body + sign-off
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I need your help."

questions.hindi: धन्यवाद और शुभकामनाएं।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject line intent + greeting + concise body + sign-off
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Thanks and regards."

questions.hindi: मैं इस प्रोजेक्ट पर काम कर रहा हूँ।
questions.english: I am working on this project.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject line intent + greeting + concise body + sign-off
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I am working on this project."

questions.hindi: कृपया इसे प्राथमिकता दें।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject line intent + greeting + concise body + sign-off
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Please give this priority."

questions.hindi: मैंने आपका संदेश पढ़ लिया है।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject line intent + greeting + concise body + sign-off
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I have read your message."

questions.hindi: मैं कल तक जवाब दे दूंगा।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject line intent + greeting + concise body + sign-off
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I will reply by tomorrow."

questions.hindi: यह ईमेल गलती से भेजा गया।
questions.english: This email was sent by mistake.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject line intent + greeting + concise body + sign-off
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "This email was sent by mistake."

questions.hindi: कृपया इसे नज़रअंदाज़ करें।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject line intent + greeting + concise body + sign-off
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Please ignore this."

questions.hindi: मुझे मीटिंग का समय पता चाहिए।
questions.english: I need to know the time of the meeting.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject line intent + greeting + concise body + sign-off
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I need to know the time of the meeting."

questions.hindi: कृपया कॉन्फ़्रेंस कॉल शेड्यूल करें।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject line intent + greeting + concise body + sign-off
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Please schedule a conference call."

questions.hindi: मैं इस सप्ताह छुट्टी पर हूँ।
questions.english: I am on leave this week.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject line intent + greeting + concise body + sign-off
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I am on leave this week."

questions.hindi: कृपया इस मामले में जल्दी कार्रवाई करें।
questions.english: Please take quick action on this matter.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject line intent + greeting + concise body + sign-off
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Please take quick action on this matter."

questions.hindi: सादर, अनीता वर्मा।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject line intent + greeting + concise body + sign-off
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Regards, Anita Verma."

questions.hindi: मुझे उम्मीद है यह ईमेल आपको अच्छा लगेगा।
questions.english: I hope you find this email helpful.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject line intent + greeting + concise body + sign-off
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I hope you find this email helpful."
